name: clarity-diff
description: Plain-English explanations of what the AI just changed, whether it matches your intent, and what to do next — automatically, inside Cursor.

commands.title: Clarity Diff: Re-run on latest change
Clarity Diff: Set Grok API key
Clarity Diff: Clear Grok API key

clarityDiff.autoDetect.description: Automatically detect and explain the latest AI change when the git working tree settles.

clarityDiff.debounceMs.description: Quiet window (in milliseconds) after working-tree edits before analysis runs.

clarityDiff.model.description: Grok (xAI) model used to generate explanations. Use a current model from the xAI catalog (e.g. grok-4.5).

clarityDiff.maxDiffBytes.description: Maximum diff size (in bytes) sent to the model. Larger diffs are truncated.

enumDescriptions: Send only the diff (fastest, least context).
Send full contents of changed files plus a project map (recommended).
Also include imported/related files of the changed files.
Also pack the whole repo's source when it fits the context budget.
clarityDiff.contextLevel.description: How much surrounding code context to send to the model.

clarityDiff.maxContextBytes.description: Maximum code-context size (in bytes) sent to the model, separate from the diff. Context is truncated to fit.

clarityDiff.contextExcludeGlobs.description: Additional path patterns to exclude from code context (e.g. "docs/*"). Secrets, lockfiles, binaries, and build output are always excluded.
